package rulecoverage

func NegativeRangeCopyLargeStruct() string {
    ruleID := "range_copy_large_struct"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`for _, v := range largeStructSlice` where the struct is > 64 bytes"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
